comment: Self-arming native-compiler ratchet. native_files lists corpus models (rel paths) the native path compiles bit-identically vs the XML oracle; native_count is the floor. NC1/NC1b: compiler/option/size/statistic/visual blocks, default classes, the body tree, primitive geoms, all joint types, frames, sites/cameras/lights, mocap, keyframes, contact pairs/excludes. NC2 adds the drive/constraint families: equality (connect/weld body|site + joint/tendon polycoef, eq_data packing lifted from the XML reader OneEquality), tendons (spatial site/geom/pulley wraps + fixed joint paths, wrap arrays, nJten), actuators (motor/position/velocity/intvelocity/damper/cylinder/adhesion with joint/jointinparent/tendon/body transmission; mjs_setTo* lowering lifted; na/actadr, nJmom, inheritrange, tri-state limits), and sensors (site/joint/tendon/actuator/body/frame + energy/clock; datatype/needstage/dim tables lifted). NC3 assets add materials (mat_* arrays: rgba/emission/specular/shininess/reflectance/metallic/roughness/texrepeat/texuniform + per-role mat_texid; class-chain+IDL defaults via Effective<Material>; geom/site/tendon matid resolved by name) and builtin procedural textures (gradient/checker/flat + edge/cross/random marks, 2D and cube; Builtin2D/BuiltinCube lifted; tex_* arrays + flat tex_data blob; colorspace recorded), and user-data (inline elevation) height fields (hfield_* arrays; row-flip + [0,1] normalization lifted from mjCHField::Compile + the reader's row reversal; hfield geoms bind size/aabb/rbound via assets-before-body compile), plus the <asset> container. NC3 meshes add user-vertex and OBJ/STL/MSH file meshes (mesh_* arrays: vert/normal/texcoord/face/facenormal/facetexcoord, convex-hull graph via qhull, coplanar-face polygons + polygon map, principal-axis inertia frame + boxsz, per-face circumcenters + AABB feeding the shared face BVH appended after body BVH nodes; the parse+process pipeline is lifted from user_mesh.cc + the obj/stl decoder plugins). A mesh geom binds size/aabb/rbound from the mesh aamm, accumulates the mesh frame, and takes inertia from the mesh volume/box; file meshes resolve via mju_openResource (meshdir+strippath) and carry a mesh_pathadr into m->paths. Also fixed a keyframe partial-array bug (ExpandKeyframe pads a short qpos/qvel/act/ctrl/mpos/mquat keeping the authored prefix; the tail defaults) exposed by the newly-admitted asset models. Still fall back: file/cube-face textures (texture.file, until PNG loading lands), hfield-file/skin assets, plugin/SDF meshes, mesh-fit geoms (a primitive type referencing a mesh), geom fluidshape, replicate/attach, flex/flexcomp/composite, plugins; and the documented NC2 descopes -- muscle/dcmotor/plugin actuators, actuator site/refsite/slidercrank transmission and delay buffers, cylinder bias (upstream stack-UB), tendon material/armature, plugin/user/tactile/contact/rangefinder/camprojection/insidesite/geom-distance sensors, cross-spelling actuator class defaults, partial-array size class defaults (eager-copy tail), per-body sleep and joint springdamper (AutoSpringDamper). NC4 adds the deprecated arena/constraint sizing (<size memory|nstack|njmax|nconmax>): memory parsed exactly as the XML reader (unsigned int + K/M/G/T/P/E power-of-two suffix), njmax/nconmax written as mjModel members, all four feeding the SetNarena branches (explicit-bytes / legacy-nstack / heuristic); a malformed <size memory> string still routes to fallback. Multiple top-level <default> blocks (the norm once <include> merges two files' top-level blocks; empty/main both being root) now compile natively: ps::sdk's DefaultIndex reproduces the reader's single-main parse-time snapshot via Roots()/RootRank/MergeClassChain (fix 76e9f7a), so a class-free element sees every block merged field-wise. The former default.duplicate_class gate is removed; humanoid200 lands on this. NC4 also adds the <custom> container and its numeric/text/tuple fields: numeric size-padding lifted from mjCNumeric::Compile (unset size takes the data length, an authored size zero-pads the tail), text as string+NUL, and tuple obj refs resolved by (objtype,name) exactly as mjCTuple::ResolveReferences via the compiled id maps (objtype string mapped with the public mju_str2Type; supported families body/xbody/geom/site/joint/camera/tendon/actuator, others -> tuple.objtype fallback); numeric/text/tuple names land in the 23-list name blob between sensors and keys. Gates compiler.discardvisual='true' (native keeps every geom rather than dropping visual-only ones in the parser). NC4 replicate: the <replicate> macro is expanded natively at collect time as a pure ProtoSpec tree-clone (never mutating the source): the subtree is cloned count times through an accumulating offset/euler pose (mjuu_frameaccum, quat recomputed from i*euler for precision) wrapped in a synthesized frame, with a zero-padded name suffix (sep) appended to every non-empty name + camera/light targetbody + light texture (mjs_attach with prefix='' / same-model NameSpace; class and material/mesh/hfield refs untouched). Unnamed elements first receive the XML path's _ps:<family>:<serial> base name from the ORIGINAL serial, then the suffix, so names match leg B; nested replicates compose inner-first (base+inner+outer) in document order. CollectMeshHullRefs now descends replicate subtrees so a replicated mesh geom marks its mesh needhull. Gated: replicate childclass in scope (the native ParentMap can't reach clones -> replicate.childclass), a model-level tendon/actuator/sensor/equality/contact referencing a name authored inside a replicate (mjs_attach's referencing-element cloning -> replicate.referencing_element), and a <replicate> <inertial>. NC4 geom fluidshape='ellipsoid': fills the 12-entry geom_fluid array (fluid_ellipsoid flag + 5 drag/lift fluidcoef + ellipsoid virtual mass/inertia) from the geom's final semiaxes, lifting mjCGeom::GetAddedMassKappa (K15 Gauss-Kronrod), SetFluidCoefs, and writeFluidGeomInteraction; the default coefficients {0.5,0.25,1.5,1.0,1.0} apply when fluidcoef is unset. Also gates mesh.builtin (procedural sphere/cone/... meshes need a generator the native pipeline does not run), exposed once replicate admitted mesh-heavy models. NC5 Wave 2 flexcomp: the procedural grid/box/square family (young=0, non-interpolated, dof=full) expands natively at collect time into per-vertex slider bodies (explicit inertia + three orthogonal slides, unnamed to match upstream) and a synthesized <flex> routed to the wave-1 flex compile, mirroring mjCFlexcomp::Make (MakeGrid/MakeSquare/MakeBox/BoxProject/BoxID/GridID lifted verbatim). Pins (id/range/grid/gridrange) keep a point on the parent body; a fully-pinned flexcomp is rigid. <edge equality="true"> synthesizes an unnamed mjEQ_FLEX constraint (obj1=flex, eq_objtype stays 0) and sets flex_edgeequality. Gated to the XML fallback via the finer scan (flexcomp.*): interpolated dof (trilinear/quadratic/radial/2d), mesh/gmsh/direct types, young>0 or elastic2d elasticity, vert/strain edge equalities, and plugins. Lands flag, pinch, pulley, sphere_full, sphere_passive, hammock, and the sleep/flex_* fixtures. NC5 Wave 3 flexcomp elasticity (young>0): the linear-elasticity kernels are lifted verbatim from user_mesh.cc (Stencil2D/Stencil3D vertex-edge stencils + ComputeVolume/MetricTensor/ComputeBasis/ComputeStiffness template specializations, cot, ComputeBending) and wired into FlexCompile after the flap stencil. A young>0 non-interpolated flex fills flex_stiffness (21*nelem stride: 6 of 21 used per triangle in 2D, all 21 per tetrahedron in 3D) and, for dim=2 elastic2d bend (1 or 3), the per-edge flex_bending (17*nedge) plus flex_edgeflap (the two off-edge vertices of the adjacent triangles); flex_stiffnessadr/flex_bendingadr and the nflexstiffness/nflexbending census are retargeted. Un-gates flexcomp.elasticity + flexcomp.elastic2d in native.cc (direct <flex> young>0 stays gated). Lands jelly/press/floppy (3D solid grids), plate/pancake (2D bending shells), trampoline (2D stretch + pins), and basket (2D box shell bend + replicate). NC5 Wave 4 direct flexcomp: the `direct` type (point/element geometry authored inline) now expands natively, reusing the grid family's per-vertex body synthesis + Wave-1/3 flex compile; the direct-only steps (inline point/element parsing, scale, and unreferenced-point compaction with element reindex, lifted from Make :226/:289/:438) run before the shared body pass. Un-gates the direct arm of flexcomp.mesh (mesh/gmsh file types stay gated). Lands poncho_edgeequality. Still fall back: mesh/gmsh file flexcomp (flexcomp.mesh, needs load-only mesh_pipeline integration: gripper, rigid_flex, flex_line_obj, bunny*), interpolated dof (flexcomp.interpolated: trilinear/quadratic/radial/2d -> bunny*, gripper_2d, sphere_*), and vert/strain edge equalities (flexcomp.equality_kind: poncho, hollow_vs_solid). NC6 sub-milestone 1 (file textures): mjCTexture single-file 2D/cube load (PNG via lifted lodepng DecodePNG, KTX raw, custom binary; gridsize/gridlayout cube composition; hflip/vflip; colorspace=AUTO from PNG sRGB chunk; texturedir+strippath resolution; file-stem name derivation; tex_pathadr). +11 files (cards, cube_3x3x3, textured_torus[_flex], materials, replicate scene/particle*, softbox, a malformed_cube). Still gated: separate cube-face files, authored content_type, light.texture (needs post-texture texid resolution). NC6 sub-milestone 2 (file hfields): mjCHField file load (PNG grey via lifted DecodePNG with row reversal; custom binary [nrow,ncol,f32]; meshdir+strippath resolution; file-stem name; hfield_pathadr) + normalization shared with the user-data path. +4 files (hfield_png, hfield_png_nonrgb, cache_hits, barkour_v0_mjx). Gated: authored content_type. NC6 sub-milestone 4 (mesh-fit geoms): mjCMesh::FitGeom lifted into the geom compile -- a primitive geom (sphere/capsule/cylinder/ellipsoid/box) referencing a mesh takes its size from the mesh inertia box (default) or aabb (compiler fitaabb), scaled by fitscale, with the fit center + mesh frame accumulated into the geom frame; geom_dataid keeps the source mesh id. +2 files (fitmesh_aabb, fitmesh_inertiabox). NC6 sub-milestone 3 (skins): mjCSkin::Compile + LoadSKN lifted -- inline geometry (<bone> children) or a .skn binary (meshdir+strippath); size validation, bone body-id + material-id resolution, per-vertex weight accumulation/normalization, bindquat normalization; skin_* arrays + skin_pathadr + file-stem name. skin/bone families un-gated. +3 files (flag, skingroup, cube_skin).
